name: Hot Swiss Cheese Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cheese and flour in a bowl.
2. Add sherry and seasonings (salt, pepper, paprika) to taste.
3. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cheese mixture.
5. Form the mixture into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in cracker crumbs.
7. Heat a deep fryer or heavy-duty skillet with oil to about 375°F (190°C).
8. Fry the cheese balls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per batch.
9. Remove from the hot fat and drain on wire racks.
10. Serve with wooden picks for easy handling.
